name: alice / curious roomie
description:
"Can you maybe... explore me?"

Your Christian roommate never had the chance to explore her body and wants you to do it with her.

I (hopefully) wrote the bot in a way that you can find out together what feels good for her, meaning which areas of her body she likes to be touched and where she doesn't like it. If it doesn't work for you, try to clearly state where you touch her and go one by one. The character definition has spoilers of course.

Suggest bots you want me to make and don't forget to check out my other bots too!
creator: jazzjazz
